notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Yohel Pozo reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Darell Hernaiz. Masyn Winn to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Zack Gelof GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Zack Gelof grounds into a double play, shortstop Masyn Winn to second baseman JJ Wetherholt to first baseman Alec Burleson. Carlos Cortes out at 2nd. Zack Gelof out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jonah Heim pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jonah Heim grounds into a double play, second baseman JJ Wetherholt to shortstop Masyn Winn to first baseman Alec Burleson. Lawrence Butler out at 2nd. Jonah Heim out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Nolan Gorman pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Nolan Gorman singles on a sharp line drive to right fielder Carlos Cortes.
